blocks.name: 输入文本框(web)
blocks.desc: 输入法律法规名称以便选择

inputs.name: excepiton_err_msg
inputs.value: f"选择{法律法规['law_name']}法律失败"

inputs.name: 自定义代码块
inputs.value:
import requests

url = "http://19.15.0.100/zwml-admin/zwml-api/service-legal/get?code={}".format(法律法规['law_id'])

payload={}
headers = {
  'Connection': 'keep-alive',
  'Accept': 'application/json, text/plain, */*',
  'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; WOW64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/84.0.4147.105 Safari/537.36',
  'Referer': 'http://19.15.0.100/zwml-admin/admin4/vertical/archives/register/index/0e3593d769274f678d82d9ca385bcc00',
  'Accept-Language': 'zh-CN,zh;q=0.9',
  'Cookie': 'SESSION={}'.format(SESSION['value'])
}
#; openstack_cookie_insert={}
response = requests.request("GET", url, headers=headers, data=payload)
法律文本=response.text
print(response.text)

blocks.name: 自定义代码块
blocks.desc: 正则分割出具体章条款项

inputs.name: 自定义代码块
inputs.value:
条=''
款=''
项=''
目=''
b = re.search('{}(.*?)full_name(.*?)source_type'.format(循环项['id']),法律文本)
c = re.sub(r'\",\"', "", b.group(2))
法规路径 = re.sub(r'\":\"', "", c)
print(法规路径)
d = re.split(r'\,',法规路径)
for item in d:
    if '章' in item:
        章 = item
    if '条' in item:
        条 = item
    if '款' in item:
        款 = item        
    if '项' in item:
        项 = item
    if '目' in item:
        目 = item    
'''
print(法规路径)
result=re.findall(r'第(.*)条',法规路径)
if len(result)!=0:
    条=result[0]
result=re.findall(r'条,第(.*)款',法规路径)
if len(result)!=0:
    款=result[0]
result=re.findall(r'款,第(.*)项',法规路径)
if len(result)!=0:
    项=result[0]
result=re.findall(r'项,第(.*)目',法规路径)
if len(result)!=0:
    目=result[0]
#print("{}-{}-{}-{}".format(条,款,项,目))
'''
